name: Breath Awareness
purpose: Steady the mind and cultivate present-moment awareness.
common_mistakes: Forcing the breath, expecting instant silence

name: Self-Inquiry
purpose: Investigate the sense of I and rest as awareness.
common_mistakes: Turning inquiry into mental argument, forcing conclusions

name: Heartfulness Meditation
purpose: Meditate lightly on the heart as a source of inner light and stillness.
common_mistakes: Straining to visualize, trying too hard
